scheme_name: Gunavatta Evam Navaachar Nishulk Paathy Pustak Yojana
page_title: Gunavatta Evam Navaachar Nishulk Paathy Pustak Yojana

details: The scheme "Gunavatta Evam Navaachar Nishulk Paathy Pustak" is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free textbooks to all students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in government and government-aided schools, as well as recognized madrasas that follow the state government curriculum.
benefits: Every year, in accordance with the guidelines of the Directorate of Elementary and Secondary Education, free textbooks are provided to all students from Classes 1 to 8 in government schools, government-aided schools, and recognized madrasas following the state government curriculum.
eligibility: The applicant must be a student from Classes 1 to 8.
The applicant must be studying in a government or government-aided school, or a recognized madrasa that follows the Uttarakhand state government curriculum.

offline: There is no selection process. Textbooks are distributed free of cost to all students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in the eligible schools.

documents_required: Documents required as per the guidelines of the respective school.

faqs.question: Who are the beneficiaries of this scheme?
faqs.answer: All students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in government and government-aided schools, as well as recognized madrasas following the state curriculum, are eligible.

faqs.question: Which classes are covered under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Students from Classes 1 to 8 are covered under this scheme.

faqs.question: Which schools are included in the scheme?
faqs.answer: Government schools, government-aided schools, and recognized madrasas that follow the Uttarakhand state government curriculum are included.

faqs.question: Is there any fee for the textbooks?
faqs.answer: No, textbooks are provided completely free of cost.

faqs.question: Is there any selection process to receive the textbooks?
faqs.answer: No, there is no selection process.

faqs.question: Are both boys and girls eligible?
faqs.answer: Yes, textbooks are provided to all boys and girls studying in the eligible schools.
